query: What is included in Class III major dental services?
answer:
| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Class III - Major Services | Labial veneers | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | are limited to anterior teeth and subject to review for dental necessity. Labial veneers are often considered cosmetic and not covered by this dental plan. For this reason, a dental estimate of your benefits is strongly recommended. |
| Class III - Major Services | Implants and implant services. Replacement implant/abutment supported crowns, dentures and bridges | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | are limited to once every 5 calendar years from the original seat date. Benefits are subject to our review for dental necessity |
| Class III - Major Services | Inlays, onlays, crowns and labial veneers for a tooth that is decayed, or fractured or where there is significant loss of clinical crown and no other dentally appropriate restoration will restore the tooth | 20% coinsurance after calendar year deductible | Benefits based on allowed amount | are limited to once every 5 calendar years from the original seat date. |
